news.title:
Deepak Chem Tech issued OCRPS worth ₹135 Cr to subsidiaries.
1.1 Cr shares to Deepak Phenolics for ₹110 Cr; 25 Lakh shares to Deepak Nitrite for ₹25 Cr.
news.summary:
Deepak Chem Tech issued OCRPS worth ₹135 Cr to subsidiaries.
1.1 Cr shares to Deepak Phenolics for ₹110 Cr; 25 Lakh shares to Deepak Nitrite for ₹25 Cr.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite gains 3.5% intraday post Dasda anti-dumping duty news but hits 52-week low.
Backward integration, rupee depreciation, and duty relief may boost advanced intermediates' EBIT.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite gains 3.5% intraday post Dasda anti-dumping duty news but hits 52-week low.
Backward integration, rupee depreciation, and duty relief may boost advanced intermediates' EBIT.

news.title:
DGTR imposes anti-dumping duties on DASDA imports from China.
This development directly impacts Deepak Nitrite's operations.
news.summary:
DGTR imposes anti-dumping duties on DASDA imports from China.
This development directly impacts Deepak Nitrite's operations.

news.title:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.
news.summary:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.

news.title:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 10 Cr OCRPS at ₹100/share, totaling ₹100 Cr.
Investment made by Deepak Phenolics to support projects and capital base.
news.summary:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 10 Cr OCRPS at ₹100/share, totaling ₹100 Cr.
Investment made by Deepak Phenolics to support projects and capital base.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite reports Q3 net profit of 998M, up from 980M YoY.
Q3 revenue rises to 19.7B rupees from 19B YoY, showcasing growth.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite reports Q3 net profit of 998M, up from 980M YoY.
Q3 revenue rises to 19.7B rupees from 19B YoY, showcasing growth.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite saw a block deal worth Rs 29.6 cr on 2026-02-11.
The transaction involved 1 buyer and 1 seller.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite saw a block deal worth Rs 29.6 cr on 2026-02-11.
The transaction involved 1 buyer and 1 seller.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite Ltd's Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call is on Feb 13, 2026.
Call hosted by IIFL Capital, covering results till Dec 31, 2025. Pre-registration open.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite Ltd's Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call is on Feb 13, 2026.
Call hosted by IIFL Capital, covering results till Dec 31, 2025. Pre-registration open.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite shares rose 6% after its arm commissioned ₹85 crore plant in Dahej, Gujarat.
Despite gains, the stock is down 33% from its 52-week high of ₹2,405 and 7% in January.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite shares rose 6% after its arm commissioned ₹85 crore plant in Dahej, Gujarat.
Despite gains, the stock is down 33% from its 52-week high of ₹2,405 and 7% in January.

news.title:
Deepak Chem Tech, Deepak Nitrite's subsidiary, inaugurated a new plant on Jan 19, 2026, in Dahej, Gujarat.
The facility includes nitration and hydrogenation processes, with a capital expenditure of approximately ₹85 crore.
news.summary:
Deepak Chem Tech, Deepak Nitrite's subsidiary, inaugurated a new plant on Jan 19, 2026, in Dahej, Gujarat.
The facility includes nitration and hydrogenation processes, with a capital expenditure of approximately ₹85 crore.

news.title:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 68M convertible redeemable preference shares worth ₹68 crore.
Shares were allotted to Deepak Phenolics to strengthen the capital base and support projects.
news.summary:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 68M convertible redeemable preference shares worth ₹68 crore.
Shares were allotted to Deepak Phenolics to strengthen the capital base and support projects.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite faced stamp duty claims of ₹1.07 crore plus penalties.
₹21 lakh claim and penalty were canceled; ₹86.1 lakh reassessed with evidence.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite faced stamp duty claims of ₹1.07 crore plus penalties.
₹21 lakh claim and penalty were canceled; ₹86.1 lakh reassessed with evidence.

news.title:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 45L OCRPS to Deepak Phenolics for ₹45Cr.
Funds will support project expenses; transaction at arm's length and par value.
news.summary:
Deepak Chem Tech issued 45L OCRPS to Deepak Phenolics for ₹45Cr.
Funds will support project expenses; transaction at arm's length and par value.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite starts nitric acid plant operations in Gujarat.
The project involved an investment of approximately ₹5.15 billion.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite starts nitric acid plant operations in Gujarat.
The project involved an investment of approximately ₹5.15 billion.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite's subsidiary issued 35 lakh preference shares at ₹100 each, raising ₹35 crore.
Funds bolster capital base and support projects; issuing subsidiary's FY25 turnover is ₹9.4 crore.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite's subsidiary issued 35 lakh preference shares at ₹100 each, raising ₹35 crore.
Funds bolster capital base and support projects; issuing subsidiary's FY25 turnover is ₹9.4 crore.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight on Deepak Nitrite, cuts target to 2,017.
The revision is due to Advanced Intermediates' weakness and capacity expansion delays.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight on Deepak Nitrite, cuts target to 2,017.
The revision is due to Advanced Intermediates' weakness and capacity expansion delays.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite faces risks from Chinese dumping and US tariffs, per Systematix Research.
Report highlights project execution delays and uncertainties impacting domestic chemical sector.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite faces risks from Chinese dumping and US tariffs, per Systematix Research.
Report highlights project execution delays and uncertainties impacting domestic chemical sector.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite's stock has dropped nearly 30% in 2025; analysts warn of challenges until 2026 due to weak phenolics and intermediates businesses.
Brokerages revise earnings forecasts downward, citing oversupply, weak demand, and delayed offtake; long-term outlook remains positive with ongoing capex.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite's stock has dropped nearly 30% in 2025; analysts warn of challenges until 2026 due to weak phenolics and intermediates businesses.
Brokerages revise earnings forecasts downward, citing oversupply, weak demand, and delayed offtake; long-term outlook remains positive with ongoing capex.

news.title:
Deepak Nitrite Q2 revenue at ₹1,922 crore, EBITDA rises 5% QoQ to ₹224 crore.
Phenolics revenue grows 2% QoQ; ₹2,000 crore capex projects to complete by mid-2026.
news.summary:
Deepak Nitrite Q2 revenue at ₹1,922 crore, EBITDA rises 5% QoQ to ₹224 crore.
Phenolics revenue grows 2% QoQ; ₹2,000 crore capex projects to complete by mid-2026.

news.title: Deepak Nitrite plans Rs 8,500 Cr investment for polycarbonate capacity expansion by FY28.
news.summary: Deepak Nitrite plans Rs 8,500 Cr investment for polycarbonate capacity expansion by FY28.
